LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MANUEL TUZ'S MOTION FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 22, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE DEFENDANT BRUNO'S PIZZA THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. DEFENDANT BRUNO'S PIZZA MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE NO LATER THAN 4PM OCTOBER 12, 2012, OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MANUEL TUZ'S Motion For Reasonable Attorneys Fees will be heard by Judge Taylor in Department 624 at 9:00 a.m. on October 30, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reasonable Attorneys Fees; Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Oct-12-2012 Continued To Oct-22-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MANUEL TUZ'S Motion For Reasonable Attorneys Fees is continued to October 22, 2012 to give Defendant Bruno's Pizza the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant Bruno's Pizza must deliver courtesy copies of its opposition papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than 4pm October 12, 2012, or the motion will be granted. The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
